entries.content: The user is building the God Tear AI Brain project: Echo persona, Atlas memory system, Guardian Council governance, on a $0-40/mo budget, using Claude Code and Cowork scheduled tasks.
v0 architecture decision: memory stored as flat atlas.json in git, no hosted database, no autonomous self-modification of constitution.md or CLAUDE.md.
Semantic search over Atlas will use local sentence-transformer embeddings + brute-force cosine similarity at v1, before considering any hosted vector DB.
